# The History of Computing: From Babbage to AI

The history of computing is a journey from mechanical gears to silicon chips, and from simple arithmetic to artificial intelligence. This evolution can be broken down into several key eras.

## 1. The Mechanical Era: The Foundations (1830s–1940s)
